controls.reason: N05 cyclic/self-rearm packet activity is not durable susceptibility by itself.
N06 repeated route selection is context selection, not source-current durable carrier update.
N08 positive geometry route response remains blocked as native conductance memory.
N07 neutral reservoir is a non-destructive exchange method, not native support.
Native route-conductance memory and native integration gaps cannot be bypassed by I5-C.
Carrier deltas must be recorded as producer-mediated source-current state mutations.
If the same-budget peer shows the same target carrier delta, SU4 support is blocked.

geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: The positive I5-C rows are producer-mediated carrier candidates. They do not prove native route-conductance memory, semantic learning, choice, agency, native support, final N22, SU5/SU6, or the N21 ND6 bridge. N08/N10/N11 native conductance and integration gaps remain load-bearing.
geometric_interpretation.short_read: I5-C finds an alternative non-consumptive carrier path by moving the durable quantity from route-b packet residue into serialized edge/conductance geometry. Repeated Lane-B readback does not spend that carrier, unlike the I5-B packet readout path.

purpose: alternative carrier probe after I5-B consumptive readout boundary
